---
title: "SEMANA 5-GRAFICOS"
author: "MAYERLI MALDONADO PACHAS"
format: html
editor: visual
---

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#CREANDO DATOS

Categorias<-c("Diabetes","Dengue","Asma","Hepatitis")
Valores<-c(10,20,30,40)
```

```{r}
#Generando el gráfico de barras

barplot(Valores,names.arg=Categorias,col="skyblue",main="Gráfico de barras",
        xlab="Categorias",ylab="Valores",border="black")
```
